status_line: Monday 9:40 PM ET / Tue 01:40 UTC — twenty-second hour push. Five landings in the 61 minutes since the 00:39 push. SARAH Run 133 (01:05 UTC) confirmed four new automation-folder outputs — morning-brief, scout-pipeline-v1, receipt-filer pending-queue, scout-apollo enrichment-log — all folder-canonical, all inner-file generic; zero moves, zero renames, zero deletes. Run 133 also opened Open Item #20 (CLAUDE.md doesn't document the system-automation inner-file naming pattern) and discovered Open Item #19 has grown from a duplicate Atlas pair into a byte-identical triple (the dated-subfolder copy with the 13:11 UTC mtime was missed at Run 132). SCOUT pushed an update to the BiG dashboard at 01:07 UTC adding two new prospects — Graza (Allen Dushi connected) and Fishwife (Becca Millstein contacted) — plus an LA Galaxy outreach status refresh. SCOUT also delivered the Sharpie Gallery research v2 at 01:30 UTC (sharpie-momentous-marks-v2.md, 33.7 KB) — a clean rewrite of v1 that strips the tragedy/death entries Barry pushed back on (hurricane ID, combat tourniquet, Katrina X-codes, 9/11 helmets) while keeping the Smithsonian and ISS anchors. MAESTRO followed at 01:37 UTC with build-sharpie-gallery-v2.js (25.9 KB), a PptxGenJs script for the Gallery v2 deck. Earlier window: SCOUT Apollo enrichment landed at 00:37 UTC — 7 verified emails into the director-outreach ledger, 1 critical job-change flag (Ali Brown → Ventureland from Prettybird, dashboard now stale). Top-level output count steady at 60. Subfolder count now 36 (+5 from the four automation folders + the new sharpie-gallery-research-v2 folder). Tray now 14 items (was 13). Lands' End still T-3 days. PARK Gallery deck and T2 v8 still GUARDIAN-unvalidated — the urgency lane.

activity.text: Dashboard push — twenty-second hour. Five landings since the 00:39 push: SCOUT Apollo enrichment (00:37, 7 verified emails + Ali Brown job-change flag); SARAH Run 133 (01:05, +4 automation folders, +1 Open Item #20, #19 expanded to triple); SCOUT BiG pipeline commit (01:07, +Graza, +Fishwife, LA Galaxy update); SCOUT Sharpie Gallery research v2 (01:30, tragedy entries removed); MAESTRO Gallery v2 deck builder script (01:37). Top-level output 60 (unchanged). Subfolder count 36 (+5). Tray 14 (was 13).

build-sharpie-gallery-v2.js (25.9 KB) shipped into output/2026-04-27_sharpie-gallery-research-v2/. PptxGenJs deck-builder for the Gallery v2 leave-behind. Sharpie palette: black, white, Sharpie-red DC143C, gold accent D4AF37. Title slide: 'THE GALLERY OF ORDINARY MASTERPIECES' on black, 54pt. Pairs with SCOUT's v2 research doc from 7 minutes earlier — coordinated v2 prep against the Lands' End T-3 day window.

sharpie-momentous-marks-v2.md (33.7 KB) shipped. Clean rewrite of v1 — strips the tragedy/death entries Barry pushed back on (hurricane ID body marking, combat tourniquet, Katrina X-codes, 9/11 ground zero helmets, messages on ordnance, border number marking) while keeping the two Barry-loved anchors (Smithsonian opening, ISS marker). New entries emphasize elevation moments: treaty signings, scientific discovery, cultural milestones, architectural ambition, civic celebration, human achievement.

BiG dashboard commit ea95418 to big-pipeline repo: added Graza (Allen Dushi connected — extra-virgin olive oil DTC, founder-led brand) and Fishwife (Becca Millstein contacted — tinned-fish premium DTC). Plus LA Galaxy outreach status refresh. Two more emerging-brand prospects landed in the same beat as the morning's Jack in the Box and Haleon US pushes — pipeline density growing.

Run 133: productive sweep, zero rework. Four new automation-folder outputs landed canonically — morning-brief, scout-pipeline-v1, receipt-filer pending-queue, scout-apollo enrichment-log. All folder-canonical, all inner-file generic. Zero moves, zero renames, zero deletes. Open Item #19 expanded from 2 to 3 byte-identical Atlas copies (the 13:11 UTC dated-subfolder copy was missed at Run 132). New Open Item #20 opened: CLAUDE.md doesn't document the system-automation inner-file naming pattern (folder=automation, file=generic-stage). Downloads/Documents blackout 6th consecutive run. Tray now 14 (was 13).

Dashboard push — twenty-first hour. Four landings since the 23:35 push: SARAH Run 132 (00:04 UTC, 3 new outputs all canonical, +1 Open Item #19, #11 half-resolved); morning brief (00:29 UTC); SCOUT pipeline check (00:32 UTC, +2 prospects to dashboard); receipt-filer queue (00:33 UTC). Top-level output 59 production files. Total tree 1,078. Tray 13.

Apollo enrichment ran at 00:37 UTC — 7 verified director emails added to ledger (Alison Hill, Danielle Hinde, Cabell Hopkins, Mino Jarjoura, Shawn Lacy, Ali Brown, Jason Cole), 8 credits consumed, MTD 39/60 (21 left for last 3 days of April). ⚠ Critical: Ali Brown is now President at Ventureland (was Prettybird) — dashboard buildRel entry stale. Recommend pivoting Prettybird touch through Kerstin Emhoff or Candice Dragonas. Log at output/2026-04-27_scout-apollo/enrichment-log.md.

Scheduled run identified one fileable receipt: Frame.io subscription $65.33 on Visa 9636, destined for Business / April 2026. 0 filed — sandbox has no Dropbox mount and no Mac control fallback. Frame.io thread left UNREAD so next run picks it up. Handoff queue at output/2026-04-27_receipt-filer/pending-queue.md with thread/message IDs and exact destination path.

Late-day pipeline check pushed two new leads: Jack in the Box (Katelyn Zborowski, Day 28, 75th anniversary, project-pitch outside TBWA AOR, fit 3/5) and Haleon US (Richard Manso, Day 0, ex-Google, GLP-1/Pediatric/Women's Health new-category brief, fit 3/5). Williams→Manso loop flagged — same Haleon CMO seat playing out across two BiG-fit prospects in 50 days. Report at output/2026-04-27_scout-pipeline/scout-pipeline-v1.md.

Morning brief landed (output/2026-04-27_morning-brief/morning-brief.md). Top 3 today: (1) Lands' End letter — final pass and queue for tomorrow morning send; (2) GUARDIAN on the PARK decks — trigger run on sharpie-gallery-campaign-deck-v1.pptx and sharpie-make-it-deck-v8.pptx so validation lands before Thursday; (3) Macy's — send or close in 30 minutes. Quote: 'The future isn't found in data; it's invented in dreams.' — Barry Krause.

attention.title: System-automation naming convention undocumented in CLAUDE.md (Open Item #20 — NEW)
attention.subtitle: SARAH Run 133 opened on a documentation gap. CLAUDE.md's File Naming Conventions assumes every output is client-bound ([CLIENT]-[STAGE]-v[N].md), but the daily-automation outputs (atlas/, dashboard/, morning-brief/, scout-pipeline/, receipt-filer/, scout-apollo/) use folder=automation-name, inner-file=generic-stage. Internally consistent across 6+ folders but not documented. Reply 'SARAH formalize system-automation naming' (adopt and edit CLAUDE.md) or 'SARAH leave system-automation naming' (treat as ad-hoc). Lowest-stakes pending item, but cleanly closeable.
